labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Mcp Rateapi Dev Mcp" provides 12 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.
labels.custom_label: Development Tools - Mcp Rateapi Dev Mcp

tools.name: get_financing_decision
tools.description: RECOMMENDED: Get personalized financing recommendations for ANY loan or credit product. Supports 5 product types: (1) Mortgages - 30yr/15yr/20yr/10yr fixed and ARMs, (2) Auto loans - new/used/CPO vehicles with 36-84 month terms, (3) HELOCs - fixed/variable rate home equity lines, (4) Personal loans - secured/unsecured, (5) Credit cards - rewards, cash_back, secured, balance_transfer, low_rate, business, platinum, student. Analyzes current market offers and returns actionable recommendations with explanations. Use this instead of looking up raw rates. Provide the user's state, intent (purchase/refinance/cash_out/balance_transfer/new_credit), and amount for personalized advice.

state.description: US state code (2-letter, e.g., CA, TX, NY). Required.

product_type.description: Type of financing product. All 5 types are fully supported: "mortgage" (home purchase/refinance), "auto_loan" (vehicle financing), "heloc" (home equity line of credit), "personal_loan" (general purpose loans), "credit_card" (credit card offers). Defaults to "mortgage".

intent.description: The loan intent. For mortgages, use "purchase" or "refinance". For auto loans, use "purchase" (new/used car) or "refinance" (existing auto loan). Required.

term_months.description: Loan term in months (12-480). Defaults to 360 (30-year) for mortgages, 60 (5-year) for auto loans. Common auto loan terms: 36, 48, 60, 72, 84 months. Common mortgage terms: 180 (15-year), 360 (30-year).

current_rate.description: Current offer rate if refinancing (percentage, e.g., 6.5 for 6.5%).

credit_score.description: Borrower's credit score (300-850). Highly recommended for accurate rate matching.

no_points.description: If true, prefer no-points loans only. Applies to mortgages.

max_providers.description: Maximum number of providers to return (1-5). Defaults to 5.

vehicle_condition.description: AUTO LOANS ONLY: Condition of the vehicle being purchased or refinanced. Affects rate eligibility.

vehicle_year.description: AUTO LOANS ONLY: Model year of the vehicle (e.g., 2024, 2020). Used to determine age-based rate tiers.

vehicle_type.description: AUTO LOANS ONLY: Type of vehicle being financed. Some lenders offer specialized rates by vehicle type.

tools.name: list_credit_unions
tools.description: Reference tool: List all credit unions grouped by state with rate availability info. Use this to discover which credit unions are available in a given state. For personalized rate recommendations, use get_financing_decision instead.

state.description: Optional: Filter to a specific state (2-letter code). If not provided, returns all states.

tools.name: get_credit_union
tools.description: Reference tool: Get detailed info and all mortgage rates for a specific credit union by state and slug. Use this when a user asks about a specific credit union. For personalized rate recommendations, use get_financing_decision instead.

state.description: US state code (2-letter, e.g., CA, TX, NY). Required.

slug.description: Credit union slug (URL-friendly name, e.g., "navy-federal-credit-union"). Required.

tools.name: create_monitor
tools.description: Create a new decision monitor that watches for rate changes and sends webhook notifications when conditions are met. Returns the monitor with a webhook_signing_secret for verifying webhook payloads.

name.description: A descriptive name for the monitor. Required.

decision_context.description: The context for evaluating rate changes. Required.

state.description: US state code (2-letter, e.g., CA, TX, NY). Required.

term_months.description: Loan term in months (12-480). Defaults to 360 (30-year mortgage).

product_type.description: Type of loan product. Defaults to "mortgage".

conditions.description: Array of conditions that must be met to trigger the monitor. Required.

operator.description: Comparison operator (lt=less than, lte=less than or equal, gt=greater than, gte=greater than or equal, eq=equal, change_pct=percentage change).

subscribed_states.description: Optional array of state codes to monitor. If not provided, monitors all states.

subscribed_product_types.description: Optional array of product types to monitor (e.g., ["30yr_fixed", "15yr_fixed"]).

webhook_url.description: The URL to send webhook notifications to. Required.

cooldown_hours.description: Minimum hours between webhook triggers (1-168). Defaults to 24.

tools.name: list_monitors
tools.description: List all monitors associated with your API key. Supports pagination and filtering by status.

limit.description: Maximum number of monitors to return (1-100). Defaults to 20.

offset.description: Number of monitors to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: get_monitor
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific monitor by its ID.

monitor_id.description: The unique identifier of the monitor. Required.

tools.name: update_monitor
tools.description: Update an existing monitor. Only provided fields will be updated.

monitor_id.description: The unique identifier of the monitor to update. Required.

tools.name: delete_monitor
tools.description: Permanently delete a monitor. This action cannot be undone.

monitor_id.description: The unique identifier of the monitor to delete. Required.

tools.name: simulate_monitor
tools.description: Test a monitor with a simulated rate change to see if it would trigger. This is a dry-run evaluation only — no webhooks are sent and no state is changed. Use deliver_test_webhook to actually send a test webhook.

monitor_id.description: The unique identifier of the monitor to simulate. Required.

rate_change.description: The simulated rate change event. Required.

state.description: US state code where the rate changed. Required.

product_type.description: The product type that changed (e.g., "30yr_fixed"). Required.

tools.name: deliver_test_webhook
tools.description: Send a test webhook for a monitor using a simulated rate change. This actually delivers an HTTP request to the monitor's configured webhook URL. Only use when the user explicitly requests a test webhook delivery.

monitor_id.description: The unique identifier of the monitor to test. Required.

rate_change.description: The simulated rate change event. Required.

state.description: US state code where the rate changed. Required.

product_type.description: The product type that changed (e.g., "30yr_fixed"). Required.

tools.name: get_extraction_stats
tools.description: Get data extraction statistics showing the scale and health of rate data collection. Use this to understand extraction volumes, product coverage, and data freshness. Supports filtering by date range and product type. Great for building transparency dashboards or monitoring data collection health.

startTime.description: Start of the time range. Supports ISO8601 (e.g., "2024-01-15T00:00:00Z") or relative times ("now-24h", "now-7d", "now-1m"). Defaults to "now-24h".

endTime.description: End of the time range. Supports ISO8601 or relative times. Defaults to "now".

product_type.description: Filter statistics to a specific product type. If omitted, returns stats for all product types.

tools.name: get_benchmarks
tools.description: Get rate benchmark statistics (min/median/max APR) across all institutions. Use this for market analysis, comparing user quotes against market rates, or building benchmark dashboards. Returns statistics for mortgages (30yr/15yr), auto loans (new/used), HELOCs, and personal loans. Each product shows the lowest APR institution, median APR, and count of institutions.

product_type.description: Filter to a specific product type. If omitted, returns benchmarks for all product types.

state.description: Filter to a specific US state (2-letter code). If omitted, returns nationwide benchmarks.

server_info_crawled.name: Mcp Rateapi Dev Mcp
